content.en:
Seeing that these Ultimate Ancient Demons all agreed, Dovi Ancient Demons showed a satisfied expression.

As long as the space-time bubble where the three hundred and sixty-five main parts are located fuse together and turn into a large space-time bubble, maybe there will really be a great opportunity for her to impact the space-time level ultimate ancient demon.

To do that, she had to give it a try.

Of course, it will take a long time for the three hundred and sixty-five space-time bubbles to fuse, so let the two space-time bubbles fuse first, and then let the other space-time bubbles fuse.

......

this day.

The space-time bubble in the realm of the Heavenly Tower, where the Dovi Ancient Demon was located, began to arrange the formation, and also arranged the formation in a nearby space-time bubble.

After a period of time, the formation was set up.

Endless time and space online.

The two formations attracted each other, and with the addition of an Ultimate Ancient Demon, the two space-time bubbles kept getting closer.

Just because the Ultimate Ancient Demon can't destroy the Spacetime Bubble doesn't mean it can't move it.

Just like a steel bead, without the help of external objects, ordinary people cannot crush the space-time foam, but they can pick up the bead and move the bead.

In the same way, the strength of the Ultimate Ancient Demon is extremely terrifying, even without the help of a formation, it is possible to move a space-time bubble, but it will be very slow. 590

And when the space-time bubble moved, ordinary creatures couldn't detect it, but those ancient demon-level powerhouses could detect it.

For a moment, many ancient demon-level powerhouses were terrified.

But after the Ultimate Ancient Demon transmitted the information, these Ancient Demon-level powerhouses understood, and they were no longer afraid, when nothing happened.

After a long time, these two space-time bubbles finally bordered.

Then, under the effect of the formation, the two space-time bubbles began to collide.

Rumble!!!

A terrifying shockwave swept through all the realms within the space-time bubble, such a shockwave was nothing to the ancient demon-level powerhouse, but it was a doomsday disaster for ordinary creatures.

Of course.

Those ultimate ancient demons don't care about the lives of ordinary creatures, even if more than ninety percent of the creatures fall, they will still be bred after a long time, and it will not affect the strength of the main department.

Moreover, the main department can protect its own people, and it is only those of small or medium tribes who have fallen.

And just like that, another period of time passed.

At this point, the two space-time bubbles are finally about to completely merge together.

this day.

The two space-time bubbles finally merged together, and the two main parts also appeared in the same space-time bubble.

......

"The rules inside the space-time bubble have been enhanced, and some new resources have been born, and sure enough, this method is feasible, but at present, it is only the fusion of two space-time bubbles, and it cannot change much, and more space-time bubbles must be fused as soon as possible!"

Dovigu thought to himself.

So, in the following days, Dovi Ancient Demon personally worried about the fusion, so that one after another space-time bubbles were integrated into the space-time bubble of the Celestial Tower's realm in the main part of the Heavenly Tower.

And soon it was the turn of the space-time bubble of the Abyss of Aromu.

The ultimate ancient demons of the Abyss of Aromu arranged formations all over the Abyss of Arromu, and a large number of items were refined into the base of the formation, gradually enveloping the entire Abyss of Arromu.

Ye Tian naturally sensed this situation, but it was not good to ask the Ultimate Ancient Demon, so he could only contact other peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, wanting to get some useful information from other Peak Ancient Demons.

However, most of the Ultimate Ancients don't know what this is all about.

It wasn't until Ye Tian contacted a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse in the main department of Ah Luo's mother that he learned the truth of the matter.

And this truth surprised him and couldn't believe it.

"What, the Ultimate Ancient Demons decided to fuse all of the space-time bubbles together to form a huge large space-time bubble?"

Ye Tian came to the endless space-time line outside the abyss of Aromu for the first time.

"Sure enough, the number of space-time bubbles decreased, and in a distant location, a huge space-time bubble appeared!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This kind of thing should be a decision made by the Ultimate Ancient Demons, and he is naturally not qualified to interfere, and he is not clear about the purpose of these Ultimate Ancient Demons fusing the space-time bubble.

Another period of time passed, and the formation arrangement was completed.

Immediately after, the Abyss of Aromu began to move, crossing the endless space-time line, and moving towards the huge space-time bubble little by little.

"It seems that it won't be long before the Abyss of Aromu will merge into that large space-time bubble, and then many main departments will be in a space-time bubble, and the competition will be even more intense!"

After another period of time, the Abyss of Aromu has touched that large space-time bubble, just like a small bubble merged into a large bubble, and it is slowly swallowed by the big bubble.

And at the moment when the devouring was completed, a terrifying shockwave swept across the entire Abyss of Aromu.

The first time.

Ye Tian used his own strength to protect the entire Eagle Department, and as for the territory outside the Eagle Department, he would not care.

Pleoz also protected the Dragonfall tribe to ensure that the Dragonriders would not be killed.

But those little tribes are finished.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying shockwave swept in, tearing the earth apart, shattering the ultimate particles, and destroying all matter as if it were annihilated.

And those ordinary general-level, king-level, and weaker emperor-level couldn't withstand such an impact at all, and they were all torn apart.

Only those powerful emperors survived, but they were also badly damaged.

"Time and space bubble fusion, the consequences are so serious!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

However, the Eagle Department is fine, and he doesn't care.

And with the abyss of Arromu integrated into this large space-time bubble, the rules of the large-scale space-time bubble were strengthened again.

In this way, another relatively long period of time passed. []

More and more space-time bubbles are integrated, making this large space-time bubble bigger and bigger, the rules are getting stronger and stronger, the ultimate particle energy is also soaring, and even many treasures and resources are born.

Ye Tian did not continue to retreat, and his replica body was also looking for resources in this new large space-time bubble.

this day.

He came to a new treasure land, where he encountered several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, which were peak ancient demon-level powerhouses from another main department.

"We occupy this treasure land, hurry up!"

Several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses surrounded Ye Tian and said coldly.

Ye Tian learned the identities of these peak ancient demon-level powerhouses by copying their talents, from a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse called the main department of the shadow, and the main department of the shadow only had two ultimate ancient demons, and their strength was not very strong.
